main.description: A single stop along the route through a play-through (eg. a map node, level, region, or encounter), for use in a play record's `state` array. Cardinality: instanced — unique per ($type, id, instanceId); writers append in visit order and dedupe by `instanceId` when present. When `seq` or `arrivedAt` is present it is the authoritative ordering; array order is the fallback.

id.description: Stable, game-defined identifier for this stop. Language-independent and consistent across play-throughs & game versions if possible.

name.description: Human-readable display name, in the locale active at write time. Optional, but recommended so renderers without a localised mapping of `id` can fall back to displaying this.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number of this stop within the run, when the game tracks one. Authoritative ordering when present.

arrivedAt.description: Wall-clock time the player arrived at this stop.

leftAt.description: Wall-clock time the player left this stop. Unset while this is the current stop.

instanceId.description: An optional unique identifier, eg. a uuid, for this specific instance of a route stop. Will prevent accidental duplicate items due to game crashes, and allow updates to specific entries if there are more than one of the same.

items.description: Game-specific lexicons that can hold additional information about this stop.
